user_query: Add a zucchini noodle pesto bowl dinner option for mother on day 4

fields.name: Zucchini Noodle Pesto Bowl
fields.short_description: A light, low-carb dinner featuring spiralized zucchini tossed in a vibrant basil pesto with cherry tomatoes and toasted pine nuts.
fields.meal_suggestion: Spiralize two medium zucchinis into noodles. Sauté them briefly in a pan with a touch of olive oil for 2-3 minutes until just tender. Toss with 2 tablespoons of basil pesto, halved cherry tomatoes, and a squeeze of lemon juice. Top with toasted pine nuts and a sprinkle of nutritional yeast or parmesan cheese.
fields.nutrition_note: Zucchini noodles (zoodles) provide a low-calorie, high-fiber alternative to pasta. Pesto offers healthy monounsaturated fats from olive oil and nuts, while tomatoes add vitamin C and lycopene.

result.reasoning: Position -1 appends the new meal to the end of the existing dinner options for Day 4. This adds a lighter, grain-free alternative to the existing soup, stuffed peppers, and taco options.
